title: Introduction of Vaping Duty Stamps Scheme on 1 October 2026
body: "From 1 October 2026, the Vaping Duty Stamps scheme requires all vaping products manufactured or imported into the UK to have a duty stamp fixed to final retail packaging.   You will be able to register for the scheme from 1 April 2026. "

taxons.title: Vaping Products Duty and Stamps Scheme
